t_ch: 这样的战斗方式……没想到，我居然还有这么激进的一面吗。
t_en: This fighting style... I never imagined that I would have such an extreme side.

t_ch: 你似乎看到了某人的影子……
t_en: You feel like you can see the shadow of someone else...

t_ch: 哟。
t_en: Yo.

t_ch: 多亏了你与贝洛伯格人之间坚不可摧的友谊，这些家伙已经被「友谊魔法」闪瞎眼了！现在，它们正躲在「夹层世界」里痛哭流涕，学习重新做人呢。
t_en: Thanks to your unbreakable friendship with the people of Belobog, these lots have been blinded by the Magic of Friendship! Now, they have retreated back into hiding in the "Betweenwhere," weeping as they reflect once more on how to behave properly.

t_ch: 以后，它们应该不会再来骚扰你们了。
t_en: I don't think they'll be back to bother you again in the future.

t_ch: 接下来，你打算怎么办？
t_en: What do you plan to do from here?

t_ch: 呵呵呵…快乐的时光总是苦短，我想是时候和各位道别了。
t_en: Hehehe... Joyous times always pass so quickly... I think it's time for us to bid one another farewell.

t_ch: 在现实宇宙中，我只是个普普通通的垃圾桶。为了维持你眼前的这个形态，我强行从「夹层世界」里汲取了很多能力…这一战过后，我的能量基本消耗殆尽了。
t_en: In the real universe, I am no more than an ordinary trashcan. In order to maintain the form you see before you, I forcibly absorbed a large amount of power from the "Betweenwhere"... After this last battle, my energy is pretty much at its end.

t_ch: 但是不必感到悲伤——有机会能结识你和贝洛伯格的各位、并与你们并肩作战，我十分荣幸，没有遗憾！
t_en: But there is no need to be sad — I am so honored to have had the chance to meet you and everyone from Belobog, as well as fight by your side. I have no regrets!

t_ch: 有办法再见到你吗？
t_en: Will I be able to see you again?

t_ch: 遇见我，就意味着「夹层世界」中又有不妙的事件发生了——如此看来，你我未来还是少见为妙！
t_en: If you meet me again, it means that something has gone terribly wrong in the "Betweenwhere" again... Looking at it this way: notot seeing each other again may be for the best!

t_ch: 不过，你身为人类的一大优势就是拥有「做梦」的能力…或许我们还能在梦中相见！
t_en: Although, being human gives you a great advantage in that you have the ability to "dream"... Perhaps we can meet again in your dreams!

t_ch: 慢走不送。
t_en: See you.

t_ch: 你身为人类的一大优势就是拥有「做梦」的能力…或许我们还能在梦中相见。
t_en: Being human gives you a great advantage in that you have the ability to "dream"... Perhaps we can meet again in your dreams!

t_ch: 话虽如此，在「夹层世界」的骚乱彻底平息之前，我还会在这里再待机一阵，以防那些家伙突然杀个回马枪。如果你愿意协助我清理余氛，就回来这里找我吧。
t_en: Saying that, I shall remain here a while longer until the disturbance in the "Betweenwhere" is completely calmed, just in case those guys decide to come back for a second round. If you are willing to help me wipe out their remaining forces, you can come and find me here.

t_ch: 那么，回头见啦，我的朋友！
t_en: Well then, may we meet again, my friend!

t_ch: 来咯，亲爱的伙伴{NICKNAME}！你是来助我一臂之力的吗？
t_en: You came! My dear {NICKNAME}, have you come to fight by my side once more?

t_ch: 那些黑影怎么样了？
t_en: How are the dark shadows now?

t_ch: 他们在从最基础的学起——如何说话，如何尊重他人，如何玩耍时不伸爪子。
t_en: They've started learning from the very basics... How to speak, how to respect other people, how to not use their claws when playing.

t_ch: 就像幼儿园的小朋友一样，或者…像是小猫？
t_en: Like children in kindergarten? Or... like kittens?

t_ch: 你有办法离开夹层世界吗？
t_en: Is there a way for you to leave the Betweenwhere?

t_ch: 嗯…这个问题我倒是从来都没想过。
t_en: Hmm... I've actually never thought about this question before.

t_ch: 我听说…只是听说，在物质世界中存在一个所谓的「垃圾桶仙子」，凭借它的力量，可以把我们从幻想生物变成真实的生命。
t_en: I hear... It is no more than a rumor, but... It is said that in the physical world, there exists a Trashcan Fairy. With their power, it could be possible for entities like us to be transformed from fantasy creatures into material beings.

t_ch: 不过，那就只是我们世界的童话而已…应该没人会把童话当真吧？
t_en: Although, this is all just a fairy tale from my world... Fairy tales aren't something to be believed, though, are they?

t_ch: （能把幻想世界中的垃圾桶变成真实生命的力量……）
t_en: (The power to transform a trashcan from a fantasy world into a material being...)

t_ch: （这么说来，那位童话里的「垃圾桶仙子」…说不定是一位虚构史学家？）
t_en: (If that's the case, it sounds like this Trashcan Fairy... may be some kind of History Fictionologist?)

t_ch: 我能去你们的世界吗？
t_en: Am I able to go to your world?

t_ch: 好问题…如果夹层世界的一切…都是现实世界扭曲而形成的意识体……
t_en: A fine question... If everything in the Betweenwhere is a consciousness formed from a distortion of the physical world...

t_ch: 那么我的世界应该已经有一个…被扭曲过的你啦！当然，这一切都只是理论而已，哈哈哈！
t_en: Then there must be... a distorted version of you that already exists in my world! Of course, this is all purely theoretical, hahaha!

t_ch: 你好好休息吧。
t_en: You should get some good rest.

t_ch: 随时欢迎你，我的朋友。
t_en: You are welcome any time, my friend.

t_ch: 你搞快点啦，我等不及了。你不会是…害怕了吧！
t_en: Hurry up, I can't wait anymore! You're not... scared, are you?

t_ch: {F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}，不必心急。即便再多等你一会儿，我也不会额外收费哟。怎么样，够意思吧！
t_en: Friend, there is no need to be anxious. I will not charge any extra fees, even if I am made to wait a little longer. See, don't you think I am a great friend?

t_ch: 等击退黑影生物后，我想帮玲宝也要一份签绘，你说…宝力先生会答应吗？
t_en: Once we've defeated these dark shadows, I want to try and get an autographed picture for Lynxy too. Do you think... Mr. Pony will agree?

t_ch: 如果你们找上希儿，她的抽象画会是怎样的？不行，越说越想看了，如果不麻烦的话，一会儿请带上我。
t_en: If you bring Seele along, I'm curious about how her abstract portrait would look like... Actually, the more I talk about it, the more I want to see it. If it's not too much trouble, would you take me with you to see her?

t_ch: （机会难得，去竞锋舰的后台看看吧。搞不好后台还真有什么观众席上看不到的乐子呢。）
t_en: (A rare opportunity. Let's check out the backstage of the Skysplitter. Maybe there's something exciting going on backstage that you won't be able to see from the spectator seats.)

t_ch: 你对自己有多少信心？
t_en: How confident are you?

t_ch: 我说不上来……
t_en: I'm not too sure...

t_ch: 你为什么想来参加演武仪典？
t_en: Why did you want to participate in the Wardance?

t_ch: 因为…因为…因为我赢得了比赛资格？
t_en: Because... Because... Because I was qualified to participate?

t_ch: （那不是卢卡吗？他怎么跑到罗浮来了？）
t_en: (Isn't that Luka? Why is he here on the Luofu?)

t_ch: 卢卡，没想到会在这里遇到你。
t_en: Luka, didn't expect to see you here.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}？你怎么在这里？
t_en: {NICKNAME}? Why are you here?

t_ch: 我经常来罗浮。
t_en: I often visit the Luofu.

t_ch: 哈哈，原来如此。这还是我第一次离开贝洛伯格，跑到…「外星」去打比赛。
t_en: Haha, I see. This is my first time leaving Belobog to compete in outer space.

t_ch: 我是来看比赛的。
t_en: I came to watch the competition.

t_ch: 那巧了，我是来打比赛的！唔…虽然，现在实在没什么获胜的信心吧，哈哈。
t_en: What a coincidence. I'm here to compete! Umm... Though I really doubt I've got any chance at winning, haha.

t_ch: 您是卢卡先生的朋友吗？自我介绍一下，我是星际和平娱乐的实习记者「卡美丽」。
t_en: Are you a friend of Mr. Luka's? Allow me to introduce myself: I am an Interastral Peace Entertainment journalist-in-training, Carmella.

t_ch: 原本这次是跟着叽米先生一起来报道演武仪典的。但叽米先生日理万机，实在很忙，所以采访热门选手、制作特别节目的工作就落到我肩上咯。
t_en: I was supposed to follow Mr. Owlbert to cover the Wardance together, but he's got a million things to attend to, so the tasks of interviewing the popular contenders and producing the special program fell on my shoulders.

t_ch: 唉，职责重大啊…我当了那么多年的实习生，如果这次搞砸了，恐怕就更没有转正的希望了。
t_en: These are huge responsibilities... I've been interning for so many years. If I screw this up, I doubt I'll ever get the chance at a full-time role.

t_ch: 公司真是严苛啊……
t_en: The IPC sure is harsh...

t_ch: 不必担心，这些都是领导给我的历练！只要这次我能拍到足够震撼人心的节目素材，今年一定可以顺利转正！
t_en: It'll be fine. It's just my boss trying to mentor me! As long as I get some shots that'll shock and awe, I'm sure I'll be able to clinch a full-time job this year!

t_ch: …我在卢卡选手身上感受到了这种节目潜力！
t_en: ...I can sense the potential of a juicy program just through Luka alone!

t_ch: 真的吗？我没什么信心呢……
t_en: Really? I'm not so sure about that...

t_ch: 你怎么来参加演武仪典了？
t_en: Why did you come to participate in the Wardance?

t_ch: 我为什么会来参加演武仪典呢？这件事说来话长……
t_en: Why did I choose to participate in the Wardance? It's a long story...

t_ch: 两位，咱们一起走走。路上给你们讲讲我为什么来到这儿。
t_en: You two, let's take a walk. I can tell you all about why I'm here on the way.

t_ch: 一起走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 我还有事。
t_en: I have something else to do.

t_ch: 卢卡选手，你的身上果然充满了新闻价值。我决定持续跟踪报道你的赛事进程。
t_en: Luka, you are absolutely radiating with newsworthiness. I've decided to follow you and report on your progress throughout the competition.

t_ch: 如果事情都像开头那么顺利就好了……
t_en: If only everything were as smooth as when it started...

t_ch: 你参加了几场比赛？
t_en: How many matches have you participated in?

t_ch: 这几天如果参加了比赛，我就不会那么焦虑了……
t_en: If I had participated in the competition these past few days, I wouldn't be so anxious right now...

t_ch: 你在叩关赛被淘汰了吗？
t_en: Did you fail in the knockout stage?

t_ch: 真要是那样…那我也算是问心无愧了……
t_en: If that was the case... I'd have nothing to feel bad about...

t_ch: 我登记参赛后这么多天，还一场比赛都没打过呢——今天是我的第一个比赛日。
t_en: It's been days since I've registered, but I haven't participated in a single match yet. Today's my first one.

t_ch: 但是别说打比赛了，我感觉自己现在正常生活都有困难！已经半只脚踏入生活不能自理的领域了……
t_en: But forget about competing, I feel like I'm struggling with just normal everyday life! I'm already halfway into the realm of needing help with daily activities...

t_ch: 为什么大家都不收冬城盾呢？用个宝石挂饰刷一下，就把钱付掉了？
t_en: Why don't people accept shields? You can pay for things just by swiping a gemstone trinket?

t_ch: 为什么大家长得都看不出年龄啊？我找一个尖耳朵小姑娘问路，叫了一声「小妹妹」，结果人家生气了，说自己已经三百四十多岁了…搞得我现在都不敢和人说话了。
t_en: Why doesn't anyone look their age? I approached this girl with pointy ears to ask for directions and I called her "little girl" and she got mad! She said she's over three hundred and forty years old... So now I'm even afraid to talk to people.

t_ch: 哦对，还有吃饭…仙舟上的食物真的吃不惯。我昨天的晚餐是一碗红油乱斩牛杂，今天一直躲在厕所里「坐火箭」……
t_en: Oh and, meals... I'm really not used to the food on the Xianzhou. Yesterday, I ate a bowl of chili oil beef offal stew for dinner, and today... I've been blowing up the toilet with my flaming rockets...

t_ch: 我理解你，卢卡选手，我也吃不惯仙舟的食物。
t_en: I feel you, Luka. I also can't get used to the food on the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 卡美丽小姐也是不习惯味道吗？
t_en: Miss Carmella, you can't get used to the food, either?

t_ch: 那倒不是，因为我是智械。
t_en: Well, not exactly. It's because I'm an Intellitron.

t_ch: …对不起，请继续。
t_en: ...Sorry, please continue.

t_ch: 总之，我第一次觉得自己这么没用，连出门问路这样的小事都做不好……
t_en: Anyways, this is the first time in my life I've felt so useless. I can't even do something as trivial as asking for directions...

t_ch: 第一次出球，难免不适应。
t_en: It's your first time away from home, so it must be hard to get used to things.

t_ch: 毕竟是异星文明…
t_en: It's an alien civilization after all...

t_ch: 谢谢安慰…唉，其实我早有心理准备。第一次见世面，难免会遇到文化冲击，只是没想到这冲击实在太大，我站不稳了。
t_en: Thank you for comforting me... Actually, I did do some mental preparations. It's my first time going out into the world, but I didn't expect it to be so overwhelming that I can't keep my footing.

t_ch: 你那些贝洛伯格的同伴都在哪里？
t_en: Where are your Belobogian buddies?

t_ch: 玲可去考古了，她想通过那块宝石挂坠了解伊戈尔回雅利洛-Ⅵ前的历史。史瓦罗大佬带着虎克去别处玩了——他真的蛮会带孩子的。
t_en: Lynx went on an archaeological escapade: She wants to try to learn about Igor's history before he returned to Jarilo-VI with that gemmed pendant. Svarog took Hook out to play — he's really good with kids.

t_ch: 我心烦意乱，现在马上就要开始第一场比赛了，状态却前所未有地差。
t_en: I'm so irate and I'm about to start my first match, I'm in worse shape than ever.

t_ch: 你接下来的对手是谁？
t_en: Who's your next opponent?

t_ch: 接下来的对手是几个云骑…啊，就是这里的银鬃…不对，我跟你解释这个干什么，你肯定比我懂…只有我什么都不懂。
t_en: The next opponents are several Cloud Knights... Ah, they're like the Silvermane here... No, why am I explaining this to you? You should know better than me... I'm the only one who doesn't know anything.

t_ch: 趁着比赛还没开始，去看看你第一场比赛的对手吧。枯坐在这里只会越想越焦虑。
t_en: Why not check out who your first opponent is before the competition starts? It's better than wallowing here, as it'll just make you more anxious.

t_ch: 谢谢你们陪我说话，排解苦闷。行啊，那我就去会会我第一场比赛的对手！
t_en: Thanks for talking to me and cheering me up. Sure, I'll head off to meet my first opponent!

t_ch: 卢卡选手重振了精神！满血复活！好耶！
t_en: Luka has regained his energy! Full health revive! Oh yeah!

t_ch: 看，那几位就是我第一场比赛的对手。
t_en: Look, those are my opponents for my first match.

t_ch: 那不是…素裳吗！
t_en: Isn't that... Sushang!?

t_ch: 嗯？你们认识吗？
t_en: Huh? You know her?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！你来看我们的比赛啦？
t_en: {NICKNAME}! Are you here to watch our match?

t_ch: 这位是咱们接下来的对手，卢卡选手。
t_en: This is our next opponent, Luka.

t_ch: 你们好，我叫卢卡，来自贝洛伯格。接下来会在擂台上和各位过招，也希望能借此机会以武会友。
t_en: Hello everyone, I'm Luka and I come from Belobog. I'll be exchanging fists with you guys in the ring. I hope we'll be able to take this chance to become friends.

t_ch: 贝洛伯格…喔！好像听小桂子提起过，但没啥印象了！那是什么地方啊？
t_en: Belobog... Oh! I think Lil Gui mentioned it before, but I can't seem to remember. What kind of place is it?

t_ch: 一个被冰雪覆盖的城市。
t_en: It's a snow-covered city.

t_ch: 哇喔…没法想象。抱歉，曜青仙舟没什么人造雪景呢。
t_en: Oh wow... I can't imagine that. I'm sorry, the Xianzhou Yaoqing doesn't have much artificial snow.

t_ch: 是一个英雄辈出的城邦。
t_en: It's a city full of heroes.

t_ch: 喔～我最喜欢英雄的故事了，有空给我仔细讲讲。
t_en: Oh, I love hero stories! Tell me more when you have time!

t_ch: 没听说过也没关系。接下来我会用自己的实力，让全银河都记住「贝洛伯格」的名字。
t_en: It's okay if you haven't heard of us. I'll make sure the whole cosmos remembers Belobog's name with my fists!

t_ch: 那我拭目以待！
t_en: In that case, I'll keep my eyes peeled!

t_ch: 素裳居然说成语了！
t_en: Sushang used an idiom!

t_ch: 我是跟踪报道卢卡选手的记者。没事，你们正常对话就好，不用管我。我在拍摄素材。
t_en: I'm the journalist who's reporting on Luka. It's fine. J—Just chat like you always do and ignore me. I'm just snapping shots for material.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你是来和卢卡先生一起参加比赛的吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, are you here to join the tournament with Mr. Luka?

t_ch: 我是教练。
t_en: I'm his coach.

t_ch: 难不成，卢卡选手就是你训练的战士？
t_en: Could Luka be the fighter that you've been training?

t_ch: 没错，你害怕了吧？
t_en: That's right. Scared?

t_ch: 怕、怕你个鬼啦。让我瞧瞧，不对，选手报名表中没你名字啊。你该不会是卢卡选手的教练吧？
t_en: Wh—Who's afraid! Lemme see... Your name isn't on the list. Are you Luka's coach then?

t_ch: 红发兄台的这条镔铁胳膊，看上去实在威猛，绝对一拳一个小朋友。
t_en: The iron arm on this red-haired boy looks like it's got power, definitely capable of taking down a kid with one punch at a time.

t_ch: 咱们可不是小朋友哦！云骑军的战术讲究的是相互配合、以多欺少！
t_en: But we're not kids! The Cloud Knights' tactical creed is to complement one another and overwhelm with numbers!

t_ch: 那叫「结阵行军」好不好！
t_en: That's called a united front, got it!?

t_ch: 我的战术…呃。对不起，这是我第一次登上演武仪典的擂台，我们队就我一个人，我也不知该用什么战术。
t_en: My strategy... Uh, sorry. It's my first time participating in the Wardance. I'm the only one in my team, so I don't have any strategy to speak of.

t_ch: 看来这位外星朋友需要一些点拨啊。这样吧，半个时辰后就要开赛了，我在擂台上给你一些实际的战术指点吧！
t_en: It appears our otherworldly friend requires some enlightenment. How about this — the match is starting in an hour. I'll give you some real-life tactical pointers in the ring!

t_ch: 李大枕头，过分了吧！哥几个请你来当教练指点战术，你怎么跑去给咱们对手站台了？
t_en: Sleepy Sushang, that's over the line! You were supposed to be our coach when we invited you here. How could you run off to the opponent's corner?

t_ch: 这不是…异邦友人需要些帮助吗。咱们云骑军平日里巡逻看到异邦朋友，不也得认真给人帮扶指路来着？
t_en: It's just... our friend from afar requires some assistance, that's all. Don't we Cloud Knights also earnestly help out and provide direction to the travelers we encounter on our daily patrols?

t_ch: 总之，输了赖你。
t_en: Bah, it'll be your fault if we lose.

t_ch: 别贫了！抓紧时间准备去！
t_en: Enough chit-chat! Get back to your prep!

t_ch: 那就谢谢这位不知年龄的热心小姐姐了…我们先回休息室了。
t_en: I appreciate it. Thank you, new friend whose age I won't try to estimate... We're heading back to the lounge.

t_ch: 咱们擂台上见！
t_en: See you in the ring!

t_ch: 所以…我第一场比赛对手的教练，要在赛场上给我指导战术？我还是对仙舟人的热情难以置信。
t_en: So... the coach of my opponent for my first match, is going to give me tactical advice in the ring? I am bewildered by the Xianzhou people's hospitality.

t_ch: 这个人吧，特别热心。
t_en: This one's very, very hospitable.

t_ch: 真是个热心肠的好人啊……
t_en: What a kind-hearted person...

t_ch: 你看，仙舟没那么可怕吧？
t_en: See? Xianzhou's not that scary, is it?

t_ch: 确实，好人还是挺多的。
t_en: You're right. There are many good people here.

t_ch: 这是卢卡选手的第一场比赛，你一定会出师大捷！
t_en: This is your first match, Luka. You're bound to win!

t_ch: （呼～卢卡，你没问题的。你可是贝洛伯格拳王。）
t_en: (Phew, Luka, you're gonna be fine. You're the boxing champion of Belobog.)

t_ch: （云骑军…不就是银鬃铁卫？银鬃铁卫里除了杰帕德先生，我还真没怕过谁。）
t_en: (The Cloud Knights... Aren't they just the Silvermane Guards? I'm pretty confident of my odds against them, except Mr. Gepard.)

t_ch: （卢卡，你是最棒的！你不会输！加油！）
t_en: (Luka, you're the best! You're not gonna lose! Go get 'em!)

t_ch: 卢卡，准备好开始你的第一场比赛了吗？
t_en: Luka, ready for your first match?

t_ch: 大概准备好了！
t_en: More or less!

t_ch: 我觉得我大概也许可能是准备好了！
t_en: I think, I, more or less, maybe, perhaps I'm ready!

t_ch: 卢卡选手，请自信一点！
t_en: Luka, have more confidence in yourself!

t_ch: 再稍等一下。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 再稍等一下。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 不管各位的世界有没有昼夜的概念，总之先祝你早上中午晚上好！ 我是你们的好朋友——叽米！
t_en: And whether or not your world has a day-night cycle — good morning, good afternoon, and good evening! I'm your good buddy Owlbert!

t_ch: 欢迎，欢迎各位来到演武仪典叩关赛现场。
t_en: Welcome! Welcome everyone, to the Wardance's knockout stage brought to you live!

t_ch: 本次比赛的两方分别是，来自罗浮云骑军的——「桂宝应援会」！嗯？这什么名字……
t_en: Presenting the two corners of this match, we have from the Luofu's Cloud Knights — Lil Gui's Support Association! Uh? What kind of name is this...

t_ch: 以及来自贝洛伯格代表队的——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: And representing the city of Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 这两组选手，究竟谁会赢得最终的胜利呢？让我们拭目以待！
t_en: Between these two groups of contenders, who will emerge victorious? We wait with bated breath!

t_ch: 来吧，卢卡先生！我的队员们会让你见识一下云骑阵法的厉害！
t_en: Come at us, Mr. Luka! My team will show you the prowess of the Cloud Knights' formation!

t_ch: 你自己不上场吗？
t_en: You're not joining in?

t_ch: 我不上，自己打架多疼啊。还是当教练简单，嘿嘿。
t_en: Nope, I'm not about to suffer in pain. It's much easier being a coach, hehe.

t_ch: 教练在比赛时要做什么？
t_en: What does a coach do during a match?

t_ch: 很简单的，教练只要站在场边，及时向选手进行战术指示就够了。
t_en: Simple: You just gotta stand at the byline and give your team tactical instructions.

t_ch: 当然了，最简单的还是当观众。小桂子此时此刻就在观众席上，居高临下地看着我们拼死拼活，她太坏了。
t_en: Of course, being a spectator is the easiest. Lil Gui's up there in the stands right now, watching us duke it out from her vantage point. She's such a baddie.

t_ch: 听到了吗，各位？现在在观众席的某处，小桂子正在看着我们。弟兄们，不能让小桂子失望！
t_en: Hear that, everyone? Lil Gui is somewhere in the audience watching us. Brothers, we mustn't disappoint our Lil Gui!

t_ch: 嘿！为了小桂子，我们一定要取胜！
t_en: Hoo! For Lil Gui, we will emerge victorious!

t_ch: 如果我输了，也有重要的人会失望。看来我们都必须全力以赴了。
t_en: If I lose, those people dear to me will be disappointed too. Looks like we have to give it our all.

t_ch: 如果云骑失败，会让小桂子失望。如果云骑获胜，会让贝洛伯格的朋友们失望。总而言之这世上一定会有人失望的！欢迎来到，残酷的输赢世界！
t_en: If the Cloud Knights fail, Lil Gui will be disappointed. If the Cloud Knights win, our friends from Belobog will be disappointed. No matter the ending, disappointment inevitably awaits one party. Welcome to the cruel world of competition!

t_ch: 为了小桂子！列阵！！！
t_en: For Lil Gui! Form up!

t_ch: 胜者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: And the winner is... Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 没想到卢卡选手初出茅庐就获得了胜利，但他能在这条道路上走多远呢？让我们，拭目以待！
t_en: Who'd have thought a rookie challenger like Luka would win? But how much further will he make it? Let us stay tuned!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我感到很不对劲…我到底是怎么了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, something feels off... What is happening to me?

t_ch: 你怎么了？还好吗？
t_en: What's wrong? Are you okay?

t_ch: 我的状态…有些奇怪。刚才我看到那些云骑士兵突然变得张牙舞爪，和一群妖怪似的。
t_en: I feel... a little strange. I just saw those Cloud Knights grow fangs and claws, like they were demons.

t_ch: 喂，你这人有没有武德？怎么赢了还骂人呢？
t_en: Hey, show a little sportsmanship! You've already won, so what's with the insults?

t_ch: 抱歉，我不是那个意思！我感觉自己眼前的一切都像是幻觉……
t_en: Sorry, I didn't mean it that way! I just feel like everything I'm seeing is a hallucination...

t_ch: 该不会是压力太大了吧？我小时候每次到考试前夕，也会觉得书上的字变得张牙舞爪，和一群妖怪似的！
t_en: Are you too stressed out? When I was younger, every time before the day of exams, it also seemed like my textbooks grew fangs and talons, as if they were demons!

t_ch: 你那个情况明显不同。
t_en: Your situation is clearly different.

t_ch: 如果是压力太大的话…不如喝一瓶好梦气泡饮吧！这是苏乐达的仙舟版，还有安神助眠的功效～「喝下美梦气泡水，嘴里甜来心里美！」
t_en: If you're too stressed out... How about a bottle of Sweet Dreams Soda! This is the Xianzhou version of SoulGlad, and it helps you sleep better too! "Grab some Sweet Dreams Soda, a sweetness that's bound to last!"

t_ch: 怎么突然插播广告？
t_en: What's with the sudden product placement?

t_ch: 我在第六个实习期里确实负责过苏乐达的广告外包…唉，可能留下了些机械记忆吧。
t_en: I was in charge of outsourcing SoulGlad's ads during my sixth internship period...  Some of it might have turned into a mechanical reflex.

t_ch: 这玩意儿能过尿检吗？
t_en: Can this stuff even pass a urine test?

t_ch: 放心好了，智械和公司机甲都能参赛，仙舟的演武仪典早就是科技局了。
t_en: Don't worry. Even Intellitrons and IPC mechs can participate — The Xianzhou's Wardance has essentially become a tech fair.

t_ch: 卢卡将好梦气泡饮一饮而尽，脸色渐渐恢复了红润。
t_en: Luka finishes the Sweet Dreams Soda in one gulp, his face gradually becomes a bright red again.

t_ch: 我好多了…很抱歉刚才说了些不得体的话。但我确实觉得几位云骑朋友的水平非同一般。
t_en: I feel much better... I'm very sorry if I said anything rude just now. I really think those Cloud Knights are a cut above the rest.

t_ch: 过度谦虚可就有些虚伪了，兄弟？咱们几个就是普普通通的大兵罢了。
t_en: Excessive compliments can seem disingenuous if overdone, pal. We're just your typical rank and file.

t_ch: 单论格斗技巧，银鬃铁卫的精锐小队也就无非是这个水平了。
t_en: In terms of martial prowess, the average Cloud Knight appears to match even the most elite Silvermane squads.

t_ch: 你夸得我都心虚了…难道说，我们真的很厉害？
t_en: Your praise is making me all confused now... Wait, could it be that... we're actually pretty strong?

t_ch: 半个时辰后
t_en: Half a dual-hour later

t_ch: 那几个云骑竟然说自己是普通士兵。这些棘手的敌人，竟然只是罗浮最普通的战士……
t_en: Those Cloud Knights said they were just ordinary soldiers... They were tough as heck, and yet they are just the Luofu's most ordinary fighters...

t_ch: 雅利洛-Ⅵ脱离银河太久了，我对大家觉得习以为常的事情反而一无所知。
t_en: Jarilo-VI has been isolated from the cosmos for so long that I'm clueless about things everyone else takes for granted.

t_ch: 且不论战力，认知的差距不是短时间内能被抹平的。
t_en: Forget strength... even the gap in everyday knowledge isn't something I can get past overnight.

t_ch: 不过就算差距再大，我也必须挥拳、必须战斗、必须胜利！
t_en: But no matter how wide that gap is, I must... wield my fists... I must fight, and I must win!

t_ch: 此时此刻，布洛妮娅大人、奥列格师父，还有希儿…留在贝洛伯格的人们正在兢兢业业地维持她的运转。
t_en: Right now, Lady Bronya, Master Oleg, and Seele... all the people who stayed in Belobog are working day and night to keep it up and running.

t_ch: 杰帕德先生如此信任我，将代表贝洛伯格出战的机会交给了我。我不能辜负这些人。我要将胜利献给他们！
t_en: Mr. Gepard placed his faith in me... entrusted me with the chance to represent Belobog. I cannot disappoint him. Any of them! I must offer nothing less than victory!

t_ch: 所以…{NICKNAME}，我想正式请求你做我的教练！
t_en: So... {NICKNAME}, I would like to officially ask you to be my coach!

t_ch: 话题怎么突然拐到我身上了？
t_en: Wuh? When did I come into the picture?

t_ch: 我没做过教练，为什么找我？
t_en: I've never done this before. Why me?

t_ch: 因为，你很强，还认识很多厉害的人…在刚才那场你冒充我教练的比赛中，你也真的为我提供了很大的帮助。
t_en: Because you're strong, and you know plenty of strong people... When you were pretending to be my coach in the last match, you were a great help!

t_ch: 我想抹平自己与这个世界的差距…{NICKNAME}，能请你帮助我吗？
t_en: I want to bridge the gap between myself and this world... {NICKNAME}, will you help me?

t_ch: 包在我身上！
t_en: Leave it to me!

t_ch: 输了可别怨我。
t_en: Don't blame me if you lose.

t_ch: 谢谢你！教练！我一定会全力以赴，认真训练的！
t_en: Thank you, Coach! I'll do my best to keep up and train seriously!

t_ch: 呜呜呜…炽烈的友情啊。你们不要这样好不好，我的镜头…进水了，画面…模糊了…呜呜呜……
t_en: Such a burning friendship. Don't do this to me, guys. My camera... it's getting wet, and the shot... it's getting blurry... Oh...

t_ch: 卢卡选手，我也会尽全力帮助你们的！你们会成为最传奇的教练和格斗家，而我将会做出足以令我转正的专题报道！
t_en: Luka, I'll do everything I can to assist you! You'll both become the most legendary coach and fighter team there is, and I'll create a special feature that will finally bag me that permanent role!

t_ch: 呃…卡美丽小姐，为什么你的梦想如此令人同情……
t_en: Oh man... Miss Carmella, why is your dream making me tear up too...

t_ch: 还是别谈我的事啦！我先给你们介绍一下比赛的规则。
t_en: Enough about me! I'll brief you on the rules for the next match first.

t_ch: （打了这么多场叩关赛，分数似乎已经够了。去竞锋舰的积分板上确认一下吧。）
t_en: (After fighting in so many knockout stages, I think our points should be enough. Time to head to the Skysplitter's leaderboard to confirm our ranking.)

t_ch: 看起来积分已经足够了。怎么样，{NICKNAME}教练，咱们准备挑战接下来的强敌吧！
t_en: Looks like I've got enough points. How about it, Coach {NICKNAME}? Let's get ready to challenge some powerful opponents!

t_ch: 嗯，回休息室准备比赛吧！
t_en: All right. Back to the lounge to prep for the match!

t_ch: 好！是时候燃起来了！咱们快回休息室吧！
t_en: Okay! Time to get fired up! Let's head back to the lounge!

t_ch: 再多休整一下吧。
t_en: Let's spend a bit more time recuperating.

t_ch: 也好，都听你的。
t_en: That works too. You're the coach after all.

t_ch: 不知不觉已经打了好几场比赛了呢！卢卡选手，有没有稍微习惯一些？
t_en: Already a few matches have gone by in the blink of an eye! Have you gotten used to the situation, Luka?

t_ch: 哈哈，习惯是习惯了。但是「幻觉」似乎越来越严重了…我的身体不会真的出了什么毛病吧？
t_en: Haha, yes, yes, I have. But the hallucinations are getting stronger... Could there actually be something wrong with me?

t_ch: 难道这就是「文化冲击」？
t_en: Could this be what they call a "culture shock"?

t_ch: 「文化冲击」会造成这么严重的幻觉吗？
t_en: Can culture shock really cause such strong hallucinations?

t_ch: 有可能哦！有个博识学会的学者千辛万苦想觐见「智识」，但在亲眼见到博识尊的一瞬间，他疯了。有机生物的大脑是很脆弱的。
t_en: It's possible! There was a scholar from the Intelligentsia Guild who wished for an audience with the Erudition no matter the cost, but he went mad the instant he laid eyes on Nous. The minds of organic lifeforms are very fragile.

t_ch: 你撞到头了吗？
t_en: Did you hit your head?

t_ch: 我可是拳击手啊！不是每天都会撞到头吗？
t_en: I'm a boxer! My head gets hit every other day!

t_ch: 那你可要注意哦，很多运动员晚年都会受脑部疾病的困扰。有机生物的大脑是很脆弱的。
t_en: You should be more careful then. Many athletes suffer from brain complications in their later years. The minds of organic lifeforms are very fragile.

t_ch: 你越说我越害怕了，还有大好的青春年华等着我燃烧呢，我不能倒下！
t_en: You're starting to scare me now... Good thing I've got plenty of youth left to burn! I can't falter now!

t_ch: 接下来这场比赛是关键比赛，而且这位对手…算是老相识。
t_en: The next match is gonna be crucial, and my opponent is... I guess you can call her an old acquaintance.

t_ch: 你见过托帕？
t_en: You know Topaz?

t_ch: 其实没亲眼见过。但贝洛伯格应该没有人不知道她吧？
t_en: Never met her in the flesh. But who in Belobog wouldn't know of her?

t_ch: 也算是他乡遇故知。
t_en: I guess you can say she's an old friend of his from back home.

t_ch: 停停停，我可高攀不上这种「故知」啊！
t_en: Yup. Me and the IPC brass. Super "old friends."

t_ch: 托帕小姐，「石心十人」中最可爱的一位，我很喜欢她。
t_en: Miss Topaz is the cutest among the Ten Stonehearts. I like her.

t_ch: 无意冒犯，卡美丽小姐，我不喜欢公司。他们差一点就把我的故乡变成了可以打包贩卖的资产。
t_en: No offense, Miss Carmella, but I'm not keen on the IPC. They nearly turned my home into an asset that could be bundled and sold.

t_ch: 卢卡先生，公司是个庞大的群体。给人们贴上标签很简单，但说到底，我们接触的每一个人都是有血有肉的生命。我也是公司产业中的一员，您难道也讨厌我吗？
t_en: Mr. Luka, the IPC is a megacorp. It's easy to pin labels on people, but at the end of it, everyone we meet is living flesh and bones with feelings. I'm also an IPC staff member. Do you hate me too?

t_ch: 是我口不择言了。请原谅我的鲁莽，卡美丽小姐。
t_en: I spoke out of turn. Please forgive my rudeness, Miss Carmella.

t_ch: 你说的不错…托帕是什么样的人，我应该亲自确认。
t_en: You're right ... You're right... I should find out what kind of person Topaz is for myself.

t_ch: （托帕…公司参赛的代表。其实我谈不上讨厌她。听说就是这位托帕小姐给予了宽限…也许她并不是什么坏人。）
t_en: (Topaz... the IPC's participating representative. Honestly, I don't really hate her. I heard she was the one who granted the time extension... Maybe she's not so bad after all.)

t_ch: （但我对公司里那些有手腕的高层有一种本能的畏惧。不行，不能让恐惧压倒我！）
t_en: (But I have a certain instinctive wariness of those bigwigs from the IPC... No, I can't let that fear control me!)

t_ch: （既然成了对手，我一定要让她见识我们的厉害…不能输给她！）
t_en: (If she's my opponent, I will let her witness our strength... I can't lose to her!)

t_ch: 卢卡，准备好出战了吗？
t_en: Luka, are you ready to fight?

t_ch: 准备好了。
t_en: Ready.

t_ch: 我准备好了。
t_en: I'm ready.

t_ch: 我也准备好拍摄了！
t_en: I'm also ready to record some footage!

t_ch: 再稍等一下。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 再稍等一下。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 接下来对阵的两方，可谓是早有积怨！还未开战，擂台上就已经火药味十足了！
t_en: Next in the ring, two competitors with a deep-seated rivalry! The atmosphere is already charged with tension before the first punch has even been thrown! You can feel the fireworks about to explode!

t_ch: 蓝方是来自贝洛伯格代表队的——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: In the blue corner, representing Team Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 红方则是星际和平公司的债务清算专家——「催讨黄玉」托帕！
t_en: In the red corner, it's the Liquidation Specialist of the Interastral Peace Corporation — Topaz, the Debt Retriever!

t_ch: 没想到雅利洛-Ⅵ的人竟然开始活跃在银河里，能在这场演武仪典中见到你我很高兴。
t_en: Who would have thought the people of Jarilo-VI would start making waves in the cosmos? It's a pleasure to see you here at the Wardance.

t_ch: 我也很期待这场比赛，托帕小姐！这是向你展示我们贝城人尊严的好机会。
t_en: I'm really looking forward to this match too, Miss Topaz! This is a great opportunity for us to showcase our Belobogian pride to you.

t_ch: 好久不见。
t_en: It's been a while.

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我也没想到会在这里见到你。
t_en: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. I wasn't expecting to see you here.

t_ch: 你怎么来参加演武仪典了？
t_en: Why did you come to participate in the Wardance?

t_ch: 这可是几个琥珀纪才举办一次的盛事。公司作为仙舟联盟的友邦，当然要出席咯。
t_en: This is a momentous event that only happens once every few Amber Eras. The IPC regards the Xianzhou Alliance as a close friend. Of course we have to attend.

t_ch: 听说你成了贝洛伯格代表队的教练，我还真是吃了一惊。
t_en: I hear you're Team Belobog's coach, which really surprised me.

t_ch: 星穹列车，你们之前帮贝洛伯格斡旋债务问题，现在又帮他们参加演武仪典…哈哈，孩子年纪不小了，也该学着自己走路了吧。
t_en: The Astral Express helped mediate Belobog's debt previously, and now you're assisting them in the Wardance... Haha. When a child is growing up, they need to learn to find their own footing in the world.

t_ch: 贝洛伯格人一直生活在艰难的环境里，我们这些孩子早就学会了走自己的路。
t_en: The Belobogians have always lived under difficult conditions. We children already knew our path forward long ago.

t_ch: 哼，豪言壮语。我对贝洛伯格并无恶意。我只是希望确认一下，在躲过了那次债务危机后，贝城人是不是真的有能力自己站起来。
t_en: Hmph, a lofty proclamation. I harbor no ill will towards Belobog. I merely wish to see if, after evading that debt crisis, the people of Belobog can truly stand on their own.

t_ch: 如果只靠着大人物发发善心让自己渡过难关，那人就永远都不会成为真正的自由人，而只会成为被赋予了自由权的奴隶。
t_en: If we rely too much on the charity of major influences to help us overcome hardships, they will never truly become free, but rather remain a servant under the illusion of freedom.

t_ch: …贝洛伯格的人，从来不是奴隶！
t_en: ...The people of Belobog have never been servants!

t_ch: 抱歉，只是说说心里话，火药味有些太重了。上场吧，贝洛伯格的卢卡。
t_en: I apologize, just speaking my mind. It appears I've ruffled some feathers. Time to get on the stage, Luka of Belobog.

t_ch: 说得没错！来吧！
t_en: You said it! Let's go!

t_ch: 胜者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
t_en: And the winner is... Luka "Strongarm"!

t_ch: 贝洛伯格代表队用自己的实力，捍卫了自己的尊严！多么激动人心啊！
t_en: Team Belobog has proven its superiority and defended its honor! What a roller-coaster of emotions!

t_ch: 真受不了。这雪鸮不是公司的员工吗？怎么这么真情实感？
t_en: Ugh, unbelievable. Isn't that snowy owl an IPC employee? Why's he getting so sentimental?

t_ch: 卢卡，你打得不错。是你赢了。
t_en: Luka, you fought well. Victory is yours.

t_ch: 你没有尽全力吧，托帕小姐。你就这么轻视我吗？
t_en: You pulled your punches, Miss Topaz. Do you think so little of me?

t_ch: 呃，你别误会…对「石心十人」来说，所谓「尽全力」是以命相搏时才会做的事。小小的比试切磋而已，最好不要出人命，连受伤都不要有，不然公司的护具可推销不出去了。
t_en: Uhm, you're mistaken... For the Ten Stonehearts, going all out is something we only do in life-and-death situations. This is nothing but a casual spar — best that everyone emerges unscathed without a scratch. We don't want the IPC's protective gear sales to take a hit now, do we?

t_ch: 你胜出了——自信一点，这是堂堂正正的胜利。
t_en: You took the win — have more faith in yourself. This was a hard-earned victory.

t_ch: 而且…恕我直言，是你轻视我吧？
t_en: And... with all due respect, it was you who underestimated me, right?

t_ch: 怎么会，我哪来的资格看不起公司的大人物啊？
t_en: Of course not. I wouldn't dare look down on one of the IPC's legendary employees.

t_ch: 你把所有带着公司头衔的人都看作公司的走狗。你觉得咱们是把灵魂卖给金钱的奴隶。不必否认，我见惯了这种眼神。
t_en: You peg everyone with an IPC job title as one of their lapdogs. You think we've sold our souls and become servants to profit. Don't deny that. I know that look all too well.

t_ch: 公司不需要灵魂这种虚无缥缈的货品。它想要的只有利润。
t_en: The IPC doesn't need fleeting intangible goods like souls. They only want profit.

t_ch: 我的家乡和贝洛伯格并无不同。我们都是在这个残酷的宇宙中挣扎着，渴望活下去获得幸福的人。而琥珀王的使者们向我展示了机会，正如我代表公司给了你们同样的机会。
t_en: My home and Belobog aren't so different. We are all struggling to eke out an existence in this merciless universe, hell-bent on living long enough to touch happiness. And the messengers of the Amber Lord gave me that chance. Just as I, on behalf of the IPC, am giving you that exact same chance.

t_ch: 所以，你明白了吧，你和我的相似之处远比不同来得更多。卢卡，我希望贝城能靠自己的力量复兴。
t_en: So, you understand now? We have much, much more in common than you think, Luka. I hope that Belobog can find the strength within to lift itself up.

t_ch: 如今你们走出家园，想让整个银河看到你们，这当然很好。不过，在这片不怀好意的银河里，你们是否做好了应对更大危机的准备呢？无论有没有，我都祝你得偿所愿。
t_en: Now you've left your city in hopes of getting the cosmos to notice you, and that's certainly admirable. But, in this cosmos full of selfishness and malice, are you truly prepared to face even greater crises? Whether you are or not, I wish you the best of luck.

t_ch: 加油吧，多赢几场。既然尽兴了，我也该走了。在罗浮上我还有不少生意要磋商呢。
t_en: Keep it up and keep winning matches. I've had my fill, so I should be leaving. I have a lot of negotiations to attend back on the Luofu.

t_ch: 托帕小姐，等等……
t_en: Miss Topaz, wait...

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Hmm?

t_ch: 我并没有瞧不起您的意思。我明白，努力活下去的人，都很了不起。
t_en: It wasn't my intent to look down on you. I believe anyone striving to survive is truly remarkable.

t_ch: 别放在心上。赛前互相人身攻击，不是格斗比赛的传统吗？
t_en: Don't take it to heart. Isn't it a tradition to trash-talk each other before a match starts?

t_ch: 我的幻觉越来越严重了，刚才和托帕作战的时候…你们知道我看到谁了吗？
t_en: My hallucinations are getting worse. When I was fighting Topaz... Do you know who I saw?

t_ch: 我看到可可利亚大人，站在擂台的对面，对我召唤出刀子似的冰锥……
t_en: I saw Madam Cocolia, standing at the other end of the ring, summoning blades of ice aimed at me...

t_ch: 这听起来确实有些严重。
t_en: It sounds like your problem is getting serious.

t_ch: 我也觉得。这已经不是「文化冲击」能解释的问题了……
t_en: I guess so. I don't think this is just some simple "culture shock" issue...

t_ch: 可能是大守护者来保佑你了。
t_en: Maybe the Supreme Guardian is watching over you.

t_ch: 她那是保佑我吗！那冷冷的冰雨在我脸上胡乱地拍，可疼了！
t_en: How's that watching over me!? Raining down a hail of ice on my face, that really hurt!

t_ch: 喔！虎克知道！一定是公司的坏蛋故意穿得像大守护者，让你不敢对她动手！
t_en: Ooh! I know! It's gotta be some IPC baddie dressed up as the Supreme Guardian so you would hesitate to attack Topaz!

t_ch: 接下来一段时间是休赛期，暂时没有安排。卢卡选手正好趁这个机会好好休息一下吧。
t_en: There's a break coming up, so there won't be any fights. Luka, you can use this chance to rest and recuperate.

t_ch: 嗯，是该休息一下了，我毕竟不是铁人。说到铁人…漆黑的虎克大人，你怎么一个人在这里？史瓦罗大佬去哪了？
t_en: Mm, I do need a break. I'm not actually an iron man or anything. Speaking of which... Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, what are you doing here on your own? Where'd Svarog go?

t_ch: 史瓦罗说，他要进行一些数据采样。让虎克在这里等他，不许打扰卢卡哥哥比赛！虎克很乖，一直一个人在这儿！
t_en: Svarog said he needed to do some data sampling. He asked Hook to wait for him here and not disturb Luka. Hook has been a goodie and waiting here alone!

t_ch: 数据采样？算了，这不是我该操心的问题……
t_en: Data sampling? Forget it. It's not something I should be worrying about...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我觉得我的症状不该拖下去了。可是，在仙舟该怎么去看病呢？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I think I need to get my symptoms looked at. But, where can I see a doctor on the Xianzhou?

t_ch: 去丹鼎司吧，我有熟人。
t_en: Let's go to the Alchemy Commission. I know someone there.

t_ch: 拜托了，希望他们的医术和娜塔莎一样高明。
t_en: Please, if you don't mind. I hope they are as good as Natasha.

t_ch: 这太卜司又是做什么的地方……
t_en: What does the Divination Commission do again...

t_ch: 简单解释一下，就是仙舟上负责信息技术的部门，平时主要负责预测未来。
t_en: A simple explanation would be that they are the information technology department on the Xianzhou. They are mainly responsible for predicting the future.

t_ch: 预测…未来？这么高大上的部门！我原本以为她是不擅长社交，看来只是不喜欢社交。
t_en: Predicting... the future? I guess they're kind of a big deal! At first I thought she was a little awkward, but I guess she just doesn't like socializing.

t_ch: 咱们接下来该干什么呢…先去看病还是先去太卜司？
t_en: What should we do first... See a doctor, or go to the Divination Commission?

t_ch: 看病要紧，先去丹鼎司吧。
t_en: It's more important to see a doctor. Let's go to the Alchemy Commission first.

t_ch: 我也这么认为。如果幻觉太严重，还是早点去看病比较好。
t_en: I agree. If the hallucinations are getting bad, we should see a doctor sooner rather than later.

t_ch: 别让玲可等太久，去太卜司吧。
t_en: We don't want to keep Lynx waiting too long. Let's go to the Divination Commission.

t_ch: 确实，不知道看病要花多久。还是先去太卜司和玲可汇合吧。
t_en: Actually, I'm not too sure how long it takes to see a doctor. Let's meet up with Lynx at the Divination Commission first.

t_ch: 我也要去！我也要去！
t_en: I wanna go too! I wanna go too!

t_ch: 史瓦罗先生不是说了吗？漆黑的虎克大人不可以打扰卢卡选手哦！
t_en: What did Svarog say? Pitch-Dark Hook the Great isn't allowed to disturb Luka!

t_ch: 可是，这个休息室太无聊了，又小又没劲…在这种小地方，虎克根本没办法大展拳脚嘛！
t_en: But, this lounge is so small and boring... I can't show off my moves in a tiny place like this!

t_ch: 那漆黑的虎克大人，我带你去金人巷吃好吃的，怎么样？你吃过咬一口会吱吱叫的鸣藕糕吗？
t_en: Then, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, shall I take you to Aurum Alley to eat yummy food? Have you ever eaten a songlotus cake that chirps?

t_ch: 没有哎，那是什么？如果虎克大人能吃到这个魔偶糕，我就，我就册封你为…鼹鼠党美食探索大队长！
t_en: I've never eaten it before. What's that! If I can taste this sun-gloters cake. I'll... I'll make you The Moles' Grand Captain of Gourmet Discovery!

t_ch: 感谢您，漆黑的虎克大人！那咱们现在就出发吧。
t_en: Thank you, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! Let's set off right now!

t_ch: 卡美丽小姐真是个温柔的人…那么快就能和虎克玩到一块。
t_en: Miss Carmella is such a kind person... She could get along with Hook so quickly.

t_ch: 好了，{NICKNAME}，我们也出发吧。
t_en: Okay, {NICKNAME}, we should get going too.

t_ch: 看，玲可在那里。我们快点去找她吧。
t_en: Look, Lynx is over there. Quick, let's go see her.

t_ch: 卢卡，你来了啊。
t_en: Luka, you're here.

t_ch: 真是奇遇，我在一个广场上看别人玩牌，结果认识了一个热心肠的姑娘。她说可以帮我修复我们带来的玉兆。
t_en: I had a strange encounter. I was at the plaza, watching people play Celestial Jade when I met a kind-hearted girl. She said she could help us repair the jade abacus we brought.

t_ch: 但是刚才她被其他几个卜者喊走了，到现在还没回来。
t_en: But she was just called away by a few diviners and still hasn't returned.

t_ch: 她就把你一个人留下了？
t_en: She left you here alone?

t_ch: 我知道是谁了…
t_en: I know who you're talking about...

t_ch: 对啊，这姑娘是不是有点过分？
t_en: Yeah, isn't this girl a bit much?

t_ch: 我去叫她回来吧。
t_en: I'll go call her back over.

t_ch: 能拜托你去吗…那边不认识的人太多了。
t_en: Could you? There are too many unfamiliar people over there.

t_ch: 那我去叫她回来吧。
t_en: Ok then, I'll go call her back over.

t_ch: 感谢，帮大忙了。
t_en: Thank you. You're a huge help.

t_ch: 那个姑娘应该就在那边，和其他几个卜者在玩什么「游戏」。
t_en: The girl should be just over there, playing some game with other diviners.

t_ch: 这太卜司真的好壮观啊…怎么天上还飘着那么大的机器？不会掉下来吗？
t_en: This Divination Commission is so majestic... Why is that device floating in midair? Won't it fall?

t_ch: 她应该就在那边，和其他几个卜者在玩什么「游戏」。
t_en: She should be just over there, playing some game with other diviners.

t_ch: 青总，你这水平越来越高了啊！平时不好好上班净琢磨游戏了吧？
t_en: President Qing, you're getting better and better! You're probably slacking off at work, playing this game, right?

t_ch: 你一个在太卜司里摆残局的人，也好意思说我？
t_en: You're one to talk, setting up endless scenarios in the Divination Commission!

t_ch: …果然是你啊，青总。
t_en: ...So it is you, President Qing.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}？不好意思，玩得有点入迷，没看时间。
t_en: {NICKNAME}? I'm sorry, I was too engrossed playing, I didn't notice the time.

t_ch: 哎！这不是{NICKNAME}吗？你在我们圈子里可有名了。
t_en: Ah! Isn't this {NICKNAME}? You're super popular in our circle.

t_ch: 我以为我在圈外也很有名。
t_en: I thought I was famous even outside your circle.

t_ch: 那不一样。我们「寻圈」肯定比圈外人还欣赏你！
t_en: That's not the same. We "Pathfinder" fans definitely admire you more than others outside the circle!

t_ch: 你们的什么圈子？
t_en: What circle?

t_ch: 我们「寻圈」每个人都认识你！
t_en: Every "Pathfinder" fan knows you!

t_ch: 就是…「寻径指津」爱好者的圈子。
t_en: It's the..."Pathfinder" fan circle...

t_ch: 我们听说你仅靠「寻径指津」就镇服了附身在太卜大人身上的岁阳，这简直是「寻径指津」诞生三百年来从未有过的高光时刻！
t_en: We heard that you relied solely on the "Pathfinder" to overcome the heliobus possessing the master diviner! That's definitely the highlight of the "Pathfinder" since its conception three hundred years ago!

t_ch: 那次主要是青雀的功劳。
t_en: That was all thanks to Qingque.

t_ch: 但我们青总可说，那次都是你的功劳！
t_en: But our President Qing said it was all down to your hard work!

t_ch: 那件事的真相应该没被报道啊！
t_en: The truth of that incident probably wasn't reported!

t_ch: 嗐，我们这不少卜者可都是当事人…瞒不住的。
t_en: Many of the diviners here were there... you can't hide it from us.

t_ch: 好啦，我和{NICKNAME}还有事要办，先走了。下次再找你玩。
t_en: Okay, {NICKNAME} and I have some things to take care of. Play with you next time!

t_ch: 不行！你们不能走！
t_en: Nooooo! You guys can't leave!

t_ch: 吓我一跳，你要干嘛……
t_en: Gosh you scared me. What do you want...

t_ch: 好不容易见到了「寻圈」的传奇人物，可不能就这么放你走了。
t_en: It's not every day we meet a "Pathfinder" legend! We can't let you leave that easily.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你得跟我玩一局「寻径指津」！不然我是不会让你带走青总的！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you have to play a round of "Pathfinder" with me, or I won't let you take President Qing away!

t_ch: 劫持人质是吧？
t_en: Holding her hostage, hmm?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，为了和你对局，我可什么事都做得出来。
t_en: Heh-heh, I'll do anything it takes just to have a match with you.

t_ch: 那这个青雀我不要了，送你。
t_en: I don't want this Qingque then. You can have her.

t_ch: 你还有几个青雀？？？
t_en: How many Qingques do you have???

t_ch: 唉，就陪她玩一局吧。我估摸着她不会放过这个在圈子里吹牛的机会。
t_en: Just play a round with her — I doubt she'll let go of this chance to boast about it.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，来一局吧！
t_en: Heheh, let's play a round!

t_ch: 陪她玩一局吧，速战速决。毕竟已经让玲可等了我很久了……
t_en: Play one round with her, and make it quick. I've made Lynx wait for me too long...

t_ch: 你准备好和我对局了吗？
t_en: You ready to have a match with me?

t_ch: 速战速决吧。
t_en: Let's end it quickly.

t_ch: 好，速战速决！
t_en: Sure, lightning quick!

t_ch: 我稍微准备一下。
t_en: I have to prepare a little.

t_ch: 真不愧是传说中的{NICKNAME}！竟然这么快就解开了我留下的谜题！
t_en: They don't call you a legend for nothing, {NICKNAME}! You solved my riddle in a flash!

t_ch: 「寻径指津」啊！一玩起来就发狠了，忘情了，没命了！我们在太卜司里，玩了一局多么壮阔、多么豪放、多么火烈的游戏哇——「寻径指津」！
t_en: "Pathfinder" — Once you play, you'll forget about hatred, love, and life itself! In the Divination Commission, we play such a magnificent, bold, and fiery game!

t_ch: 满意了吧？那我们走啦，明天要是没事再来找你玩。
t_en: Satisfied now? Then we'll be off. We'll come find you tomorrow if we're free.

t_ch: 稍等，{NICKNAME}。其实近期，我们「寻圈」借着演武仪典的东风，也在办一场大型活动。
t_en: Hold on, {NICKNAME}. Recently, our "Pathfinder" circle has also been organizing a major event, taking advantage of the momentum from the Wardance.

t_ch: 不止罗浮，还来了不少其他仙舟的我道中人。
t_en: Not just for those on the Luofu, plenty of our like-minded brethren on other Xianzhou ships have also come.

t_ch: 你可能已经在报纸上看到我们的广告了。有兴趣的话，可以参与一下。
t_en: You may have seen our ad we put out in the papers. You should join if you're interested.

t_ch: 如果能有你参与，那我们这第一次大型活动可就算是圆满成功了！
t_en: If you join up, our first major event will be considered a wild success!

t_ch: 我有时间会参加的。
t_en: I'll participate if I have time.

t_ch: 太好了！我们太期待了！
t_en: Fantastic! Looking forward to it!

t_ch: 我没啥兴趣。
t_en: I'm not interested.

t_ch: 没关系，你心中的「寻圈」魂终究会破茧而出！
t_en: That's fine too. The Pathfinder soul within you will come round eventually!

t_ch: 哈哈，没想到吧？你在一个莫名其妙的圈子里红得一塌糊涂。
t_en: Haha, who would've thought? That you'd be so immensely popular in some weird circle.

t_ch: 我们在报纸上刊登了广告，你之后可以注意一下～
t_en: We put out an ad in the newspaper, you should look out for it!

t_ch: 这位朋友就是你说的卢卡吧？久仰久仰，最近总能在新闻上看到你～我叫青雀，是太卜司的卜者。
t_en: Is this the friend that you mentioned? Luka? Pleased to finally meet you. I keep seeing you in the news! My name is Qingque, a diviner from the Divination Commission.

t_ch: 玲可小姐都跟我说了。她还说了自己手头有个稀罕的古董，想让我给她看看能不能修好。
t_en: Miss Lynx has told me everything. She also said she found some rare antique that she hopes I can fix.

t_ch: 我一看，这不是玉兆嘛…还是好几百年前的旧型号。出于好奇心，我就包揽了复原数据的活儿。
t_en: At first glance, I knew it was a jade abacus... and an old model from centuries ago too. Out of curiosity, I accepted the job to restore the data inside it.

t_ch: 你居然主动揽活？
t_en: You actually accepted a job without resistance?

t_ch: 这不青雀！
t_en: That's not like you at all, Qingque!

t_ch: 唉…也瞒不过你。太卜大人不是回玉阙老家办事了吗？临走前塞给我一大堆数据、表格、数据、表格、数据、表格…眼睛都快看瞎了！
t_en: ...Nothing gets past you. You know that the master diviner has returned to the Yuque on business? Before she departed, she left me with a mountain of data, spreadsheets, and even more data and spreadsheets... My eyes were seeing stars!

t_ch: 现在有机会摆在眼前，能修复重要的历史文献…这差事严格来说不算摸鱼，还能看到点新鲜故事，何乐而不为呢？
t_en: Now that such an opportunity has fallen into my lap to restore an important historical document... Strictly speaking, taking this job doesn't count as slacking off, and I might even get to unveil a fascinating tale. Why wouldn't I take the job?

t_ch: 其实我已经修复好一部分资料了。但玲可说，一定要让你第一个看，因为这枚玉兆的主人是你的人生偶像。
t_en: And I've actually already restored part of the information. But Lynx said that you have to be the first one to look at it, because the owner of this jade abacus is your idol.

t_ch: 她说的没错。谢谢你，玲可。
t_en: She's right. Thank you, Lynx.

t_ch: 那就让我们开始播放吧。
t_en: Let's play the recording then.

t_ch: 气氛好沉重，大家都不说话。
t_en: This is sad, nobody's saying anything.

t_ch: 不知道该说什么。
t_en: I don't know what to say.

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 真是个…比预想中要沉重的故事啊……
t_en: This story... got much heavier than anticipated...

t_ch: 伊戈尔在反物质军团入侵前离开了母星，此后在银河各处参加拳赛时，他会在获胜后向观众演讲，希望引起人们对反物质军团的警觉并拯救自己的家园。
t_en: Igor left his home planet before the Antimatter Legion invaded. When he participated in all the fighting tournaments across the cosmos, he would address the audience with a speech after he won, hoping that would raise awareness about the Antimatter Legion and save his planet.

t_ch: 他…真是个了不起的人。
t_en: He... really was an extraordinary person.

t_ch: 可惜银河太大了，一颗星球的呼救声又太小了…抱歉，我刚才不该用那么轻佻的口吻说什么「新鲜故事」。
t_en: Alas, the cosmos is infinitely vast, easily drowning out one planet's meek cry for help... Sorry, I shouldn't have spoken so flippantly about a "fascinating tale" earlier.

t_ch: 没事啦，再怎么样这也已经成为历史故事了。
t_en: It's all right. This is a chapter in history that's already happened anyway.

t_ch: 不管怎么说，时隔七百年，竟然还能听到伊戈尔本人的声音，我已经很开心了。
t_en: Regardless, to be able to hear Igor's actual voice after seven centuries... Makes me more than happy.

t_ch: 这段信息完全没提到仙舟联盟…也不知道他最后是怎么一路打到罗浮的。
t_en: This section of information doesn't mention the Xianzhou Alliance at all... I wonder how he fought his way to the Luofu.

t_ch: 总之现在已经修复出来的内容就是这些了。我应该还能抢救出一些信息，不过需要几天时间。
t_en: Anyway, this is all the content that's been restored so far. I should be able to salvage some data, but I'll need a couple of days.

t_ch: 也许那些信息能告诉你们，他为什么到了仙舟。如果有了新进展，我们会再通知你们的。
t_en: Perhaps the subsequent data will be able to tell us why he arrived on the Xianzhou. We'll contact you if there are any new findings.

t_ch: 我这段时间会先留在太卜司，因为修复玉兆还有些事需要我帮忙。
t_en: I'll stay at the Divination Commission for now. There are some other matters I have to handle besides restoring the jade abacus.

t_ch: 我会尽可能修复玉兆里的信息，不过需要一点时间。
t_en: I'll try my best to restore the data in the jade abacus, but it'll take some time.

t_ch: 头有些晕…咱们赶快去看病吧。
t_en: I feel dizzy... Let's hurry up and see a doctor.

t_ch: 你先回去吧，我想一个人再上街逛逛。
t_en: You go back first. I'm going to take a stroll along the streets.

t_ch: 我陪你逛逛吧。
t_en: I'll accompany you.

t_ch: 呜呜呜，你嫌弃我～
t_en: Boohoo, you don't like me anymore!

t_ch: 刚才在丹鼎司就应该给你也开点药。
t_en: Looks like the Alchemy Commission should've given you a prescription as well.

t_ch: 那位医生让我在城里走走，多见见世面。
t_en: That doctor advised me to walk around the town, and see more of the sights.

t_ch: 如果多像这样独自在街上逛几次，也许还能克服自己对大都会的恐惧…前几天刚到罗浮的时候，实在是把我给吓到了。
t_en: If I can walk along the streets alone a few more times, I might be able to conquer my fear of the big city... This place scared the heck out of me when I first got here.

t_ch: 唉…毕竟往后我也要像伊戈尔一样，为了贝洛伯格在银河各处打比赛。
t_en: ...After all, in the future... I'll have to be like Igor, competing all over the cosmos for Belobog.

t_ch: 可不能每次都被吓到出现幻觉啊！哈哈哈哈！
t_en: I can't keep getting spooked and hallucinating all the time! Hahaha!

t_ch: 哇！这就是丹鼎司？这一整块地方都是医院吗？也太大了吧？
t_en: Woah! This is the Alchemy Commission? This whole place is a hospital? Can it get any bigger than this?

t_ch: 这不算医院，其实是科研机构。
t_en: This isn't really a hospital, but a research institute.

t_ch: 这是个医学研究所一类的地方？直接带我来这里看病，你可真厉害啊！
t_en: Wow! Cutting edge medicine. You must really be something to bring me straight here to get treated!

t_ch: 这甚至是地位最低的司部。
t_en: And this is just the lowest-ranking department.

t_ch: 这是所有部门里最小的一个？这、这真是难以想象……
t_en: This is the smallest of all departments? This... This is just unbelievable...

t_ch: 这几贴膏药应该就可以了。
t_en: A few patches should do the trick.

t_ch: 哎！那不是素裳小姐吗？她怎么也在？
t_en: Oh! Isn't that Miss Sushang? What's she doing here?

t_ch: 素裳小姐，好巧啊！你也有病啊？
t_en: Miss Sushang, what a coincidence! I guess you have a problem too?

t_ch: 怎么说话呢？你才有病！
t_en: What sort of greeting is that!? You're the one with the problem!

t_ch: 抱歉抱歉，我是说…你也来看病啊？
t_en: Fine! Sorry, I mean... Are you here to see a doctor too?

t_ch: 不是，我来给那几位云骑弟兄开点跌打损伤药。
t_en: No, I came here to help my Cloud Knight coworkers get medication for their bruises and swelling.

t_ch: …不好意思，是我下手太重了。
t_en: ...Sorry, I went too hard on them.

t_ch: 公平竞赛，怨不得人。倒不如说要感谢卢卡朋友，他们对你的实力大加赞赏，表示要努力练习。
t_en: It was a fair match, so no one's to blame. Actually, we should be grateful to you — they were so impressed by your abilities that they said they want to train harder.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。你身边这位是？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, we meet again. Who is this beside you?

t_ch: 演武仪典的参赛选手。
t_en: A Wardance contestant.

t_ch: 贝洛伯格的域外访客。
t_en: A foreign visitor from Belobog.

t_ch: 打伤纯良云骑的凶手。
t_en: The thug who beat up the kind Cloud Knights.

t_ch: 我们那是比武！公平公正，我可绝对没做违反道义的事！
t_en: It was a martial contest! Open and fair! I swear I didn't do anything unjust!

t_ch: 你好，我叫卢卡，是{NICKNAME}的朋友。我来自贝洛伯格，是这次演武仪典的参赛选手！
t_en: Hello, I'm Luka, a friend of {NICKNAME}'s. I'm from Belobog, and a contestant in the current Wardance!

t_ch: 贝洛伯格…抱歉，恕妾身孤陋寡闻了。不过，欢迎你来到罗浮。卢卡先生想问诊？
t_en: Belobog... Apologies, I'm not familiar with the name. Regardless, welcome to the Luofu. Mr. Luka, are you here for a consultation?

t_ch: 呃，事情说来有些诡异……
t_en: Uh, this might sound weird...

t_ch: 卢卡详细阐述了自己来到罗浮后产生幻觉的症状。
t_en: Luka details the hallucinations he experienced upon arriving in Luofu.

t_ch: 有趣。…嗯，先做个造影检查吧，确认一下脑部有没有器质性问题。格斗家嘛，总难免会出一些类似的问题。
t_en: Interesting... Mm, let's run an imaging test first to confirm that your brain has no organic issues. A fighter's bound to run into such problems.

t_ch: 嗯？怎么还和「气质」有关系？气质不好也算有病吗？
t_en: Huh? What's it got to do with anything organic? I thought mechanical parts were fine in the tournament.

t_ch: 是「器质性问题」！意思就是…怎么给你解释呢？其实就是脑子坏掉了。
t_en: Not that organic! It means... How do I explain this? It means that the brain is broken.

t_ch: 啊——脑子坏掉了？！
t_en: Ahhh!!! The brain is broken!?

t_ch: 放心吧，既然你来到了丹鼎司，我会尽力想办法的。
t_en: Don't worry. Now that you're at the Alchemy Commission, I'll do my best to find a solution.

t_ch: 站好不要动…三、二、一……
t_en: Hold still and don't move... Three, two, one...

t_ch: 茄子！
t_en: Cheeeese!

t_ch: 这不是在合影！
t_en: We're not taking a photo!
Hmm...

t_ch: 司鼎大人，您看出什么了吗？我还有救吗？
t_en: Cauldron Master, what do you see? Is there any hope for me?
Hmm...
Hmm...

t_ch: 他的脑部有个非常巨大的阴影…难道说……
t_en: There's a huge shadow in his brain... Could it be...

t_ch: 我、我还年轻，医生，我还不想死……
t_en: I—I'm too young to die, Doc...

t_ch: 没事卢卡，咱们积极治疗。
t_en: Don't worry, Luka. Let's stay positive and focus on the treatment.

t_ch: 我一定积极治疗，战胜病魔。
t_en: I'll do it, I'll stay positive and defeat the demons of this illness.

t_ch: 会不会是误诊？
t_en: Could it be a mistake?

t_ch: 啊…那片阴影长得好像我的手啊。
t_en: Ah... That shadow looks a lot like my hand.

t_ch: 你看，还在比「耶」呢！都说了这不是合影。
t_en: Look, you're still making the "V" sign! I told you it's not a photo!

t_ch: 从造影结果来看，你的脑袋似乎没有任何问题。卢卡先生，你最近吃了什么特别的东西吗？
t_en: From the exam results, it looks like there's nothing wrong with your brain. Mr. Luka, have you been eating anything unusual lately?

t_ch: 我想想…刚到仙舟的时候吃了些特产——鸣藕糕、红油乱斩牛杂、鳞渊冰泉、苏打豆汁、辣子鸡丁、蒜苗五花肉……
t_en: Let me think... I ate some of the local delights when I got here — Songlotus cake, chili oil beef offal stew, Scalegorge spring water, mung bean soda, spicy diced chicken, garlic-infused pork...

t_ch: 等比赛正式开始之后，我的食谱就很固定了——糙米、玉米、荞麦、水煮鸡胸肉、水煮牛腿肉、水煮鱼肉、水煮虾肉……
t_en: After the tournament officially started, my diet has been pretty much the same — brown rice, corn, buckwheat, boiled chicken breast, boiled beef shank, poached fish, boiled prawns...

t_ch: 呃…喂猪呢？
t_en: Uh... Are we feeding livestock here?

t_ch: 卢卡先生，你大胆告诉我，{NICKNAME}是不是在虐待你？我会给你做主的！
t_en: Mr. Luka, don't be afraid to tell me: Is {NICKNAME} mistreating you!? I will make sure you get justice!

t_ch: 没有啊！现在是比赛期间，我要控制饮食，可不敢乱吃东西。
t_en: Of course not! I have to watch what I eat during a match. I can't be stuffing myself with junk.

t_ch: 虽然食量惊人，倒也没什么会吃坏脑子的东西啊。
t_en: Your appetite astounds me, but it seems you didn't eat anything that might affect your brain.

t_ch: 哦对了！和素裳小姐打完比赛之后，我喝了一瓶「好梦气泡饮」！但那之前我已经开始出现幻觉了啊？
t_en: Oh right! After the match against Miss Sushang, I drank a bottle of Sweet Dreams Soda! But I think I was already hallucinating before that?

t_ch: 好梦…气泡饮？
t_en: Sweet Dreams... Soda?

t_ch: 妾身大概明白是怎么回事了。你身在异乡，难免有些神经紧张。这种紊乱不安的精神状态，在你饮下好梦气泡饮后被激化了。
t_en: I think I understand what's going on. It's not unusual to be anxious when you're far away from home. When your nerves were thrown into disarray, the Sweet Dreams Soda you drank intensified it.

t_ch: 那种饮料里添加了不少忆质，原本是用于活跃睡梦，让人好梦连连。但不知为什么，却导致了你的不安感放大了，最终引发了严重的幻觉。
t_en: That drink has a fair amount of memoria in it, intended to make dreams more vivid and pleasant, but instead it caused your anxiety to be amplified, eventually triggering serious hallucinations.

t_ch: 对不起，刚才的话我一句都没听懂……
t_en: Sorry, I didn't understand a word you just said...

t_ch: 听不懂也没关系。这种症状无药可医。
t_en: It's all right. There's no cure for such a symptom.

t_ch: 我的意思是，不必吃药。你在罗浮上多逛逛，接受新鲜事物的冲击，还有，不要再喝好梦气泡饮了。用不了多少天，你的症状就会逐渐消失。
t_en: What I mean is that you don't require medication. Just stroll around the Luofu more and take in the barrage of new sights and sounds. Just stop drinking Sweet Dreams Soda and your symptoms will disappear in a few days.

t_ch: 多在罗浮上逛逛…不要喝好梦气泡饮…好的医生，医嘱我记下了。
t_en: Stroll around the Luofu more... Don't drink Sweet Dreams Soda... Ok, I've got it memorized.

t_ch: 妾身突然想起来，还有个小东西能帮你缓解症状…请稍等片刻。
t_en: I'm suddenly reminded of something that might help alleviate your symptoms... Please wait a moment.

t_ch: 能帮我缓解症状的小东西？
t_en: Something that can help alleviate my symptoms?

t_ch: 灵砂大人说，这几帖药是起效最快的…不过明天就要继续打比赛了，能行吗？
t_en: Lady Lingsha said that these medical patches are very effective... But we're fighting again tomorrow, will it be enough?

t_ch: 你们不是被淘汰了吗？
t_en: I thought you guys were eliminated?

t_ch: 是被淘汰了啊，但是现在又复活了。
t_en: We were, but we've been revived.

t_ch: 现在还有其他比赛吗？
t_en: Are there other competitions happening?

t_ch: 没有啦。
t_en: Nope.

t_ch: 你们不知道吗？演武仪典有「人气复活」的机制。被淘汰的选手或队伍，只要在网络投票里获得足够的人气，就能参加复活赛重返赛场～
t_en: You guys didn't know? The Wardance has a "popularity revival" rule. If eliminated contenders or teams garner enough popularity votes in online polls, they can participate in the repechage and re-enter the ring!

t_ch: 原来素裳小姐的队伍人气那么高？
t_en: So Miss Sushang's team is really popular then?

t_ch: 哼哼，主要还是因为我有个好闺蜜！我们家小桂子在网络上振臂一呼，人气投票立刻山盟海誓般地涌来！
t_en: Heheh, it's all mainly thanks to my good friend, Lil Gui! All she has to do is tap a finger on the internet, and our popularity votes will blast through the roof like a comet!

t_ch: 是「山呼海啸」吧？
t_en: You mean like a rocket?

t_ch: 你明白我意思就行！
t_en: You know what I mean!

t_ch: 是「山穷水尽」吧？
t_en: You mean like a crocket?

t_ch: 真的吗？我文化低，可真的会信哦！
t_en: Are you sure? I'm not well-read, so I might really believe you!

t_ch: 反正就是在小桂子的努力下，我素裳又回来啦！
t_en: Anyway, it's all thanks to Lil Gui's hard work that I, Sushang, am back in the fight!

t_ch: 哈哈，真不错！有个值得依靠的朋友，真是世界上最幸福的事了。
t_en: Haha, not bad at all! A friend that you can rely on is the most blissful thing in the world.

t_ch: 卢卡先生，快来看看，这是我为你准备的「梦貘疗法」。
t_en: Mr. Luka, come take a look. This is the tuskpir treatment that I've prepared for you.

t_ch: 我的天啊…这是什么？摸一下！我的天啊…这是什么？摸一下！
t_en: Whoa... What is it? Touch it! Touch it!

t_ch: 么么～么～么么～
t_en: Mehr mehr! Mehr!

t_ch: 哦哦…太可爱了，宝宝你是一个草莓大馒头～么么，宝宝，么么～
t_en: Ooh... It's too cute! You're just like a strawberry bun! Little sweetie!

t_ch: 素裳你理智一点。
t_en: Please come back to your senses, Sushang.

t_ch: 面对如此萌物，我理智不了一点！
t_en: Never! I can't stay rational in the face of such cuteness!

t_ch: 素裳你矜持一点。
t_en: Please stay calm, Sushang.

t_ch: 面对如此萌物，我矜持不了一点！
t_en: Never! I can't stay calm in the face of such cuteness!

t_ch: 这是朱明仙舟的梦貘，性温、味甘、不可食用喔。
t_en: This is a Tuskpir of the Xianzhou Zhuming: Warm, sweet, not for consumption.

t_ch: 可爱是可爱，但，它能帮我治病？
t_en: It's pretty cute, but how can it make me better?

t_ch: 梦貘是靠吞食忆质生存的生物。抱着它入睡可以提高睡眠质量、治疗失眠多梦、缓解焦虑抑郁。
t_en: The tuskpir is a creature that subsists on memoria. Hugging it while you fall asleep can raise your sleep quality, treat insomnia, and relieve anxiety and depression.

t_ch: 而且，梦貘还偏爱那些「重口味」的忆质，你越是焦虑，它吃得越开心。对不对呀，小家伙？
t_en: And, the tuskpir loves "strong" memoria: The more depressed you are, the more happy it'll be. Isn't that right, little fella?

t_ch: 么么～么！
t_en: Mehr mehr, mehr!

t_ch: 听起来好神奇啊！那价格？
t_en: Sounds great! Er, how much?

t_ch: 不必担心。这只梦貘，是妾身私人豢养的小宠物，我可以把它作为医疗道具借给你。只是你要好好爱护它。
t_en: Don't worry. This tuskpir is a personal pet of mine. I can lend it to you for this treatment, but you have to take good care of it for me.

t_ch: 真的太感谢了。这一路来受了联盟不少恩惠…我一定会回报各位的。
t_en: I can't thank you enough. All throughout my journey, I've received so much help from the Alliance. I will definitely repay everyone.

t_ch: 那个！你们俩！一会儿还有别的事要办吧？扛着这只宝宝一定很不方便吧！对吧对吧？！
t_en: Oh! Oh! You two! You guys have something important to attend to later, right? It must be awfully tiring lugging this cutie-pie around, right? Right? Right!?

t_ch: 你要干什么…
t_en: What are you up to...

t_ch: 不要用那种警惕的眼神看着我啦！
t_en: Stop staring at me with those wary eyes!

t_ch: 你惦记我们的梦貘？
t_en: Are you trying to take our tuskpir?

t_ch: 怎么，借我摸摸不行吗？
t_en: What, can't I touch it just a little?

t_ch: 你们先去忙你们的事情，我正要回竞锋舰给队员们送药…我呢，身为云骑，急人所急，日行一善，这只梦貘，我可以帮你们抱回休息室！我就抱一抱，绝对不会据为己有的！
t_en: You all go take care of your stuff. I'm about to head back to the Skysplitter to deliver some meds to the team... As a Cloud Knight, I always help out and do at least one good deed a day. I can take this tuskpir to the lounge for you! I'll just hold it for a bit, I swear I won't steal it!

t_ch: 当然可以啦，素裳小姐。你也可以随时来找它玩～
t_en: That's fine by me, Miss Sushang. You can also come play with it anytime you want~

t_ch: 好诶！谢谢卢卡先生～
t_en: Aw yeah! Thank you, Mr. Luka!

t_ch: 过来吧，宝宝，嘿嘿嘿～你这样的小梦貘，生来就是要被裳裳姐姐吃掉的哟～嘿嘿嘿～
t_en: Come here, cutie, hehe~ Adorable little tusky, you're so cute. I could just gobble you right up, hehe~

t_ch: 么？么！么么么么！
t_en: Mehr? Mehr! Mehr mehr mehr mehr!

t_ch: 素裳将梦貘抱在怀里，露出了甜梦中才有的笑容，离开了你们的视野。
t_en: Sushang holds the tuskpir in her arms smiling, and then walks out of sight

t_ch: 她这样子，和希儿第一次见到活的冰原熊时一模一样……
t_en: She's acting just like Seele did the first time she saw a real plains bear...

t_ch: 看来梦貘不仅能让人恢复理性，还能让人丧失理性。倒也算是个有趣的研究课题。
t_en: Looks like the tuskpir not only regenerates rationality, it also destroys it. Now that'd make for an interesting research topic.

t_ch: 两位没有其他需要的话，妾身就先走一步了。
t_en: If there's nothing else I can do for the both of you, I'll be on my way.

t_ch: 感谢您的梦貘，我一定会好好爱护它。
t_en: Thank you for the tuskpir. I will treasure it and shower it with love.

t_ch: 出发吧
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 我们在丹鼎司耽搁了不少时间，希望没有让玲可和太卜司的人等得太久。
t_en: We were delayed at the Alchemy Commission. Hope we didn't keep Lynx and the Master Diviner waiting too long.

t_ch: 你先回去吧，我想一个人再上街逛逛。
t_en: You go back first. I'm going to take a stroll along the streets.

t_ch: 我陪你逛逛吧。
t_en: I'll accompany you.

t_ch: 呜呜呜，你嫌弃我～
t_en: Boohoo, you don't like me anymore!

t_ch: 刚才在丹鼎司就应该给你也开点药。
t_en: Looks like the Alchemy Commission should've given you a prescription as well.

t_ch: 那位医生让我在城里走走，多见见世面。
t_en: That doctor advised me to walk around the town, and see more of the sights.

t_ch: 如果多像这样独自在街上逛几次，也许还能克服自己对大都会的恐惧。毕竟往后我也要像伊戈尔一样，为了贝洛伯格在银河各处打比赛。
t_en: If I can walk along the streets alone for a few more times, I might be able to conquer my fears of the big city. After all, I'll have to be like Igor, competing all over the cosmos for Belobog in the future.

t_ch: 可不能每次都被吓到出现幻觉啊，哈哈！
t_en: I can't keep getting spooked and hallucinating all the time! Haha!

t_ch: （卢卡回来了吗？去休息室看看吧。）
t_en: (Is Luka back yet? Let's head back to the lounge and take a look.)

t_ch: （唉…又迷路了。这大城市的每条街都长得一模一样，我想喝杯茶都那么困难……）
t_en: (*sigh* ...I'm lost again. The streets in this big city all look the same. I just want to enjoy a cup of tea. Why is it so difficult...)

t_ch: （卢卡，凡事得往好处想！这不正好能锻炼我问路的能力吗？就问问旁边这个小哥吧。）
t_en: (Isn't this a great opportunity to practice asking for directions? Let's ask this guy.)

t_ch: 这位…小哥…呃…不知您多大年纪，我可以叫您「小哥」吗？
t_en: Excuse me... little bro... Uh... I'm not sure how old you are. Can I call you "little bro"?

t_ch: 嗯？问我吗？如果你不是长生种，那我猜咱们的年纪差不多大。请问有什么事吗？
t_en: Hmm? Are you talking to me? If you're not one of the long-life species, then I guess we're around the same age. Is there something you need?

t_ch: 小哥，我想问一下，去「不夜侯」该怎么走？
t_en: I'd like to ask, how can I get to the Sleepless Earl?
